official_functions.role: Construct the official Configuration clientbound show_dialog packet fixture
Write and read the official Configuration clientbound show_dialog body through the context-free codec registered in ConfigurationProtocols.CLIENTBOUND
Encode the direct NoticeDialog fixture without registry-backed Holder lookup
Provide the minimal official dialog fixture used by the context-free show_dialog packet
Write the full Configuration clientbound framed show_dialog packet
Dispatch and decode the full Configuration clientbound framed show_dialog packet
Name the packet id assigned in Configuration clientbound state

invariants: The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the show_dialog body.
The official Configuration clientbound protocol table registers ClientboundShowDialogPacket.CONTEXT_FREE_STREAM_CODEC, not the registry-friendly STREAM_CODEC.
The official ClientboundShowDialogPacket.CONTEXT_FREE_STREAM_CODEC writes a direct NoticeDialog body accepted without a registry-backed Dialog holder lookup.
The official Configuration clientbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ClientboundShowDialogPacket.
The decoded official ClientboundShowDialogPacket preserves the show_dialog packet type, decoded packet class, dialog class, title, counts, and common flags for the fixture.
The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded dialog fields, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.
This contract does not prove dialog UI display behavior, screen flow, registry-backed dialogs, custom actions, Configuration completion, registry hydration, Play entry, or runtime behavior.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer dialog UI display behavior, screen flow, registry-backed dialog behavior, Configuration-to-Play readiness, registry hydration, Play readiness, or runtime behavior.
